home.subtitle: Your record, stored on this device.

share.title: Share your record
share.subtitle: Let a clinic scan this to request your record
share.hint: The clinic completes the request on their side after scanning.

slides.welcomeBody: Your health record — owned by you, carried with you, shared only when you choose.
slides.ownBody: temetro keeps your health record on your phone, not locked inside a clinic database.
slides.encryptedBody: Your data is sealed with keys that never leave your phone. Only you can unlock it.
slides.shareBody: Scan a clinic's QR to share securely — and you approve every request before anything leaves.

register.title: Create your wallet
register.subtitle: Your record lives on this device, encrypted with keys only you hold. Tell us who you are to get started.
register.dobHelper: Used to show your age on your record.

settings.title: Settings
settings.footer: Your keys and record never leave this device.

reset.title: Reset wallet?
reset.body: This permanently deletes your keys and on-device record. You'll need to register again. This cannot be undone.

phoneDialog.title: Phone number
phoneDialog.description: Kept only on this device, as part of your record.

languageSheet.title: Language
languageSheet.subtitle: Choose the language for the app
languageSheet.restartBody: Please close and reopen temetro to finish switching the layout direction.

lock.foundWallet: We found your saved wallet on this device.
lock.enterPin: Enter your PIN to unlock it.
lock.enterPassphrase: Enter your passphrase to unlock it.

vaultSetup.choosePin: Choose a 4-digit PIN to open the app.
vaultSetup.confirmPin: Enter your PIN again to confirm.
vaultSetup.choosePassphrase: Choose a passphrase to open the app.
vaultSetup.confirmPassphrase: Enter your passphrase again to confirm.
vaultSetup.failed: Couldn't secure your wallet. Please try again.

camera.accessBody: temetro uses the camera to scan a clinic's QR code so you can share your record.
camera.scanHint: Point your camera at the QR shown on the clinic screen.
camera.sharedBody: The clinic has received your encrypted record.
camera.failedBody: We couldn't reach the clinic relay. Check your connection and try again.
camera.shareBody: A clinic is requesting {{name}}. Your record is encrypted to them and signed by your wallet — nothing is shared until you approve.

menu.linkDesc: Connect this wallet to your file at the clinic.
menu.bookDesc: Pick a doctor and a free time slot.
menu.resultsDesc: See upcoming visits and download lab files.

portal.linkedNamed: You're linked to {{name}}'s file. You can now book appointments and view your results here.
portal.linkedGeneric: You can now book appointments and view your results here.
portal.notLinkedBody: Ask the clinic to add your wallet number to your file, then try again.
portal.noDoctors: No doctors are available right now.

updates.title: Record update
updates.subtitle: {{clinic}} wants to update the record on this device.
updates.keyChangedWarning: This clinic's signing key changed since you last trusted it. Only approve if you expected a new key.
updates.replaceNote: Approving replaces your on-device record with this version.

errors.missing: This file is no longer on your device.
errors.unknown-clinic: Your clinic didn't say where this file lives, so it can't be opened yet.
errors.failed: Couldn't get this file. Check your connection and try again.
errors.no-viewer: No app on this phone can open this file type.

notificationsScreen.emptyBody: Clinic updates and share requests will appear here.

addDocument.title: Save a document
addDocument.none: Photograph a paper record to keep it here
addDocument.sheetDescription: Photograph paperwork to keep it with your record. It stays on this phone and is never sent to a clinic.

permission.camera: Allow camera access to photograph a document.
permission.library: Allow photo access to choose an image.

addDocument.failedBody: Something went wrong saving that document. Please try again.
